summary: Applied two surgical seam edits: strengthened the opening callback to the previous chapter's legal-pad setup and removed a carryover inventory inconsistency at the close while preserving chapter beats and the Chapter 15 handoff.
edits: Added an opening-line callback to the yellow legal pad and `Monday School` blue-dot detail from chapter 13.
Changed the end-of-scene pocket item from MetroCard to library card to match prior-chapter inventory continuity.
